entities.name: competitive paradigm
entities.context: A mindset that emphasizes competition, which V argues is becoming obsolete

entities.name: AI

entities.name: humanity

relationships.context: Human-centered AI is proposed as a solution to the issues posed by the competitive paradigm
AI's capabilities contrast with the unique human qualities that are valuable in work
Career coaching should help people claim work that utilizes their human qualities
